subcodes.first_line: O leaf upon the Tree of Life! The Tree of Life, of which mention is made in the Bible, is Baha'u'llah, and the daughters of the Kingdom are the leaves
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه شجره حیات شجره حیات که در کتاب مقدس مذکور حضرت بهاء الله است و بنات
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @Christ; Christianity, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
